styleBase: Premium pastel pink glossy studio scene, luxury toy aesthetic, cute but sophisticated, soft dreamy lighting, glossy reflections, vertical 9:16 composition. The LeoNes pH Gloss is a cute living toy mascot: a frosted glass tube with a soft pink swirl inside, a fluffy white cotton-cloud cap, a tiny adorable face, and small stubby arms when awake. The product shape never changes. Absolutely no text, captions or words anywhere in the frame, keep clean empty space at the top for a logo overlay. No humans. Slow smooth cinematic camera
audioBase: Audio: no human voice, no spoken words, no narration, no subtitles. Only cute toy sounds: tiny squeaks, soft boops, plush toy noises, little doll-like giggles and playful gibberish, magical pops and sparkle chimes, over soft bouncy cute premium background music

clips: Act 1, the sleep: the pH Gloss mascot is asleep on a soft pastel pink cloud-like surface, perfectly still except a gentle breathing movement, tiny sparkle chimes twinkle, the camera pushes in very slowly; near the end its eyes open slowly and it blinks with a cute squeaky boop sound

Act 2, the wake-up: continuing the exact same scene, the fluffy cloud cap wiggles, the mascot stretches like a tiny cartoon character, small stubby arms appear, and it yawns adorably in soft toy gibberish, plush squeak sounds with every stretch

Act 3, the glow-up: continuing the exact same scene, it notices the camera, becomes confident, smiles and does cute little poses with squeaky boops; then a final hero shot, glossy shine sweeping across the tube, soft pink sparkles, product perfectly centered with clean space above

Act 1, the professional: the mascot stands perfectly centered on a glossy pink studio photo set trying to stay perfectly still for a product photo; a camera flash fires with a click, it lets out a tiny toy giggle and shifts slightly, trying to recompose itself

Act 2, the blooper: continuing the exact same scene, another camera flash fires and it accidentally jumps, spins in the air and lands in a cute pose; it tries hard to behave but glitter around it starts dancing, making it giggle with squeaky doll sounds, camera clicks keep firing

Act 3, the cover shot: continuing the exact same scene, slow beauty close-ups of the fluffy cap, glossy body and pastel reflections; then a final hero pose, one cute wink, a sparkle pop sound, product centered and calm

Act 1, the entrance: pink runway lights turn on one by one down a miniature glossy pink fashion runway; the mascot appears at the far end and walks forward with tiny toy footsteps and squeaky sounds, full of confidence

Act 2, the moment: continuing the exact same scene, it stops mid-runway, spins gracefully, its fluffy cap sparkles and soft heart-shaped lights appear around it; it strikes three funny model poses, each punctuated with a little boop sound

Act 3, the finale: continuing the exact same scene, slow-motion glossy close-ups with drifting glitter and soft lens flares; then the final runway hero shot, product perfectly centered under the lights with clean space above, playful fashion music resolving sweetly

Act 1, the arrival: inside a soft premium pink handbag interior, a small mirror, a keychain and little accessories rest perfectly still; the pH Gloss mascot rolls gently into frame with a soft magical pop sound and settles in the middle

Act 2, the star: continuing the exact same scene, the other objects react with tiny cartoon surprise bounces (no faces on them), little toy gasps in doll gibberish; the mascot poses proudly, surrounded by subtle drifting glitter

Act 3, the treasure: continuing the exact same scene, premium close-ups of the product nestled in the bag looking giftable and precious; final shot of the bag open with the product glowing softly at its center, sparkle chime

Act 1, the discovery: the mascot stands next to a big glossy pink button on a clean pastel set; curious, it taps the button with a boop sound and small sparkles burst out; delighted, it taps again and tiny hearts float up around it

Act 2, the chaos: continuing the exact same scene, it taps again and pastel confetti rains down; it taps too many times too fast and gets surrounded by beautiful glitter chaos, laughing with squeaky toy giggles, button click sounds stacking musically

Act 3, the calm: continuing the exact same scene, the glitter settles slowly into a clean premium beauty composition; final hero shot, product centered and glowing softly, one last gentle boop and sparkle chime

Act 1, the tease: the mascot stands on a pastel pink background as the camera slowly pushes in; its fluffy white cotton-cloud cap begins to wiggle softly with tiny plush squeaky sounds, the mascot glancing up at it curiously

Act 2, the pop: continuing the exact same scene, the cap pops upward like a soft cloud with a satisfying fluffy sound, releasing tiny sparkles; the mascot looks surprised, then delighted, and does a cute little dance with toy giggles

Act 3, the settle: continuing the exact same scene, macro beauty shots of the cloud cap texture, the glossy body and soft reflections with magic dust sounds; the cap settles back perfectly, final centered product shot with one magical sparkle

Act 1, the glance: the mascot sits near a small round mirror on a soft pink vanity table; it slowly turns toward the mirror, sees its reflection for the first time and reacts with a shy tiny squeak, hiding behind its own cap

Act 2, the confidence: continuing the exact same scene, shyness melts into pride with cute doll gibberish; it practices poses in the mirror: a wink, a spin, a sparkle, a little bounce, each with its own squeaky toy sound

Act 3, the icon: continuing the exact same scene, glossy premium beauty close-ups reflected in the mirror with shimmer sounds; final shot of the product and its reflection perfectly aligned, soft sparkles framing the scene

Act 1, the mystery: a premium pink gift box with a satin ribbon sits under soft studio lighting; the box shakes gently and tiny muffled squeaky sounds come from inside, rustling paper sounds building curiosity

Act 2, the reveal: continuing the exact same scene, the ribbon unties itself magically, the lid pops open with a burst of glitter, and the pH Gloss mascot jumps out, lands softly, looks around wide-eyed and giggles with toy sounds

Act 3, the gift: continuing the exact same scene, it poses proudly next to the open box while sparkles and tiny hearts float slowly; final hero shot of the product in front of the gift box, premium and giftable, warm sparkle chime ending
